channel.title: Norway on Dr. Mowinckel's
channel.description: Recent content in Norway on Dr. Mowinckel's

item.title: Norway's New ME/CFS Guidelines Got It Backwards
item.description: The Norwegian Directorate of Health published draft guidelines for ME/CFS that recommend graded activity over pacing — the opposite of what NICE 2021 concluded and what the biomedical evidence supports. As a post-COVID patient and caretaker for someone with ME/CFS, I wrote a detailed consultation response. Here’s what the guidelines get wrong, why it matters, and how you can respond before the May 4th deadline.
